# Development Summary — purely-cart-bugfix-PURELY-1

| Field | Value |

---

## Implementation Summary

### BUG-1 — Cart API 404 for Authenticated Users (BRD-001 / US-001 / PURELY-16)
- **Root Cause**: `user-service` used MongoDB database `purely_user_service` while `auth-service` used `purely_auth_service`. Users registered via auth only existed in the auth DB.
- **Fix**: Changed `microservice-backend/user-service/src/main/resources/application.yml` MongoDB URI from `purely_user_service` to `purely_auth_service`.
- **Impact**: Single-line config change. No code logic change. Backward-compatible.

### BUG-2 — NaN Rendering in Cart/Checkout UI (BRD-002 / US-002–004 / PURELY-17–19)
- **Root Cause**: `parseFloat(undefined)` returns `NaN`. Cart state initialized as empty `{}` with no numeric defaults.
- **Fix**:
  - `frontend/src/api-service/cart.service.jsx` — Safe default: `useState({ cartItems: [], subtotal: 0, noOfCartItems: 0 })`. Error handler also sets safe defaults.
  - `frontend/src/components/cart/cart.jsx` — `parseFloat(cartItem.amount || 0).toFixed(2)` and `parseFloat(cart.subtotal || 0).toFixed(2)`
  - `frontend/src/pages/checkout/checkout.jsx` — Same safe parseFloat pattern
- **Impact**: Zero API changes. Component props unchanged. Inline fix per ADR-002.

### BUG-3 — Broken Product Images (BRD-003 / US-005–007 / PURELY-20–22)
- **Root Cause**: `<img>` tags had no `onError` handler. External image URLs could be stale or unavailable.
- **Fix**: Added `PLACEHOLDER_IMAGE` (inline SVG data URI, ~263 bytes) and `onError` handler with `data-fallback` loop guard in:
  - `frontend/src/components/cart/cart.jsx`
  - `frontend/src/pages/checkout/checkout.jsx`
  - `frontend/src/pages/products/products.jsx`
- **Impact**: Network-free fallback. No external requests. Inline per ADR-003.
